description: Private context layer for AI agents: web, docs, code search, dep graph, memory, planning.
name: io.github.aryankumar06/infimium

environmentVariables.description: Optional Tinyfish API key for web_search.
environmentVariables.name: SEARCH_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Search provider. Use tinyfish for the current web_search implementation.
environmentVariables.name: SEARCH_PROVIDER

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the codebase Infimium should index.
environmentVariables.name: CODEBASE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to local docs Infimium should index.
environmentVariables.name: LOCAL_DOCS_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated commands allowed by the shell tool.
environmentVariables.name: SHELL_ALLOWLIST
